text:
Name of Love is the 5th ending theme of the Attack on Titan anime, performed by Japanese alternative rock band .

It replaced Requiem der Morgenröte in Episode 50 and was replaced by Shock in Episode 60.

Lyrics

TV size

 

 

Complete version

 

 

Ending animation

Standard

The ending animation is a slideshow of still images of scenes from previous episodes in the anime. In order, these images are: 

Eren Jaeger, Mikasa Ackermann, and Armin Arlelt as children sitting by the river in the Shiganshina District.
The 104th Cadets in a classroom with Marco Bodt raising his hand in the back.
Eren failing at his ODM gear training while being instructed by Keith Sadies.
Keith frightening Sasha Braus when giving the new recruits part of their "Rite of Passage".
Eren asking Reiner Braun and Bertholdt Hoover for help in the dorms.
The cadets in their snow training exercise during a snowstorm while Historia Reiss is pulling Daz in a cot alongside Ymir.
Eren passing his ODM test and holding up his arms in pride.
The cadets during Titan combat training.
Mikasa and Annie Leonhart prepared to spar with each other as other trainees watch.
Eren using Annie's kicking technique on Jean Kirschtein at dinner.
Mikasa, Armin, Jean, Sasha, Conny, Reiner, Bertholdt, Ymir, and Historia saluting after staying to join the Scout Regiment with Annie walking away in the background.
The newly joined Scout Regiment members wearing their uniform capes as they walk towards the rising sun.

The ending finishes with a shot of an empty cadet dorm.

Episode 58

In Episode 58 the intro of the song plays over the final scene, and the animation starts when the refrain begins. The animation is completely different from the standard version, as it depicts various ancient Eldian drawings:
Ymir Fritz making a deal with the Devil of All Earth.
Titan Ymir fighting off a Marleyan army.
Four of the Nine Titans putting Marleyans soldiers on the run.
A Titan attacking people while their village is being burnt and pillaged by Eldian soldiers.
Several Titans fighting in a battle on the side of Eldia against another army.
The Wall Titan forming the Walls.
The Founder Ymir Fritz with the other members of the Nine Titans.
